game_info.title: Waterpark Story
game_info.concept: **워터파크 스토리 (Waterpark Story):** Players construct and manage a grid-based water park by tapping on a menu to select and place various pool types, water slides, and facilities onto available land. Guests visit the park, generating income and satisfaction, which can lead to them becoming SNS friends and providing feedback that guides further development. The core loop involves building attractions, establishing restaurants to offer diverse dishes and drinks, and gifting items like tubes and swimsuits to enhance guest satisfaction. Progression is driven by attracting more visitors, increasing SNS popularity, and unlocking new types of equipment and customization options for the park, including outdoor pools. The objective is to create a highly-rated water park that satisfies guests, with difficulty scaling as guest expectations for variety and service increase.
game_info.description: Build and manage your dream water park! Place pools, slides, and facilities on a grid to attract guests. Serve food and drinks at restaurants, and gift items like tubes and swimsuits to keep visitors happy. Satisfied guests become SNS followers and spread the word about your park. Earn money from guests, unlock new attractions, and expand your park to create the ultimate water paradise. Balance construction costs with guest satisfaction to achieve a 5-star rating!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu and grid selection
Space: Confirm selection / Place item / Speed up time
Z: Cancel / Delete selected tile
Shift: Toggle between Build/Gift/Delete modes
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic building mechanics and guest spawning. Verify that the player can place pools and facilities, and that guests spawn and generate income correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Place a small pool and a restaurant in the first few seconds. Wait for guests to spawn and interact with facilities. Verify money increases and guests leave satisfied.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully place buildings, spawn guests, generate income, and achieve basic functionality without errors. Test completes after 300 frames or when sufficient income is generated.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully place buildings, spawn guests, generate income, and achieve basic functionality without errors. Test completes after 300 frames or when sufficient income is generated.

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning condition by achieving 5-star rating. This tests the full game loop including building variety, guest satisfaction, SNS followers, and progression.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Strategically build diverse attractions (pools, slides, restaurants) to maximize guest satisfaction. Gift items to guests to boost happiness. Focus on achieving high SNS follower count and maintaining guest satisfaction above thresholds.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching 5-star rating (1000+ SNS followers with high satisfaction). Test validates full progression loop and win condition.

TEST_3.test_description: Test deletion and rebuilding mechanics. Verify that players can remove buildings and reclaim space for better layouts.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Build initial facilities, then use delete mode (Shift + Z) to remove them. Rebuild in different configurations to optimize park layout.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully delete and rebuild facilities without errors. Verify grid state updates correctly and money refund works properly.

TEST_3.expected: Successfully delete and rebuild facilities without errors. Verify grid state updates correctly and money refund works properly.
